test.query: WITH 'Many years later as he faced the firing squad, Colonel Aureliano Buendia was to remember that distant afternoon when his father took him to discover ice.' AS s SELECT replaceAll(materialize(s), ' ', '_') AS w FROM numbers_mt(5000000) FORMAT Null

WITH 'Many years later as he faced the firing squad, Colonel Aureliano Buendia was to remember that distant afternoon when his father took him to discover ice.' AS s SELECT replaceAll(materialize(s), ' ', ' ') AS w FROM numbers_mt(5000000) FORMAT Null

WITH 'Many years later as he faced the firing squad, Colonel Aureliano Buendia was to remember that distant afternoon when his father took him to discover ice.' AS s SELECT replaceAll(materialize(s), 'distant', 'distant') AS w FROM numbers_mt(5000000) FORMAT Null

WITH 'Many years later as he faced the firing squad, Colonel Aureliano Buendia was to remember that distant afternoon when his father took him to discover ice.' AS s SELECT replaceOne(materialize(s), 'distant', 'distant') AS w FROM numbers_mt(5000000) FORMAT Null

WITH 'Many years later as he faced the firing squad, Colonel Aureliano Buendia was to remember that distant afternoon when his father took him to discover ice.' AS s SELECT replaceAll(materialize(toFixedString(s, 153)), 'distant', 'distant') AS w FROM numbers_mt(5000000) FORMAT Null
